evals.prompt: Show me what's connected to my network right now — I want to see each device's name, IP, and how much bandwidth it's currently using
evals.expected_output: A formatted list of connected clients showing device name/hostname, IP address, and current throughput (upload and download rates)

evals.prompt: What's my WAN IP, current internet speed, and how long has the router been up?
evals.expected_output: WAN IP address, download/upload speeds in Mbps, and router uptime in human-readable form (days/hours/minutes)

evals.prompt: List all my firewall policies — I want to know which ones are enabled vs disabled
evals.expected_output: Complete list of all firewall policies (all 85, paginated) showing each policy name and enabled/disabled status
